overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character in a teal kimono and straw hat walking through a lush forest transitioning into a mystical field of red spider lilies. The third-person camera follows the character as they pass a robed figure standing on a large stump and continue through the vibrant flower field under bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest clearing with ancient stump shrine

events.description: character walks past the large tree stump with the robed figure

agents.ego_description: walking through dense green forest undergrowth toward and past a figure standing on a large stump

notable_agents.action: standing motionless on a large tree stump wearing red and brown robes

entered.detail: massive weathered tree stump with a robed figure standing atop it
dense green foliage and plants covering the forest floor
tall deciduous trees with green leaves forming the forest canopy
tall deciduous trees with green leaves forming the forest canopy
large moss-covered boulders among the trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense forest with lush green undergrowth, approaching and passing a large tree stump where a robed figure stands motionless. Tall trees surround the area with dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: mystical forest floor covered in dense red spider lilies

events.description: environment transitions from green undergrowth to dense field of red spider lilies
location text 'SHIROTSU WOODS' appears on screen

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dense field of red spider lilies with scattered trees throughout

entered.detail: dense carpet of vibrant red spider lilies covering the entire ground surface
hazy mountain range visible through the gaps in the trees

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as the environment transforms into a breathtaking field of vibrant red spider lilies stretching in all directions. Scattered trees dot the landscape, and distant mountains become visible through the haze as the location name 'Shirotsu Woods' appears on screen.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, shaded forest that gradually opens into a vast, mystical field of red flowers. It begins with the character walking through lush green undergrowth under a canopy of tall trees, where dappled sunlight filters through the leaves as they pass a motionless robed figure standing on a large stump. As the character continues forward, the greenery gives way to a breathtaking expanse of vibrant red spider lilies stretching in all directions. The scene then expands to reveal scattered trees and distant mountains emerging through a light haze, while the location name Shirotsu Woods appears on screen.
